div1.entryFree:
Successively, 1) in uninterrupted order, one following another: is it upon record, or else reported s. from age to age? R3 III, 1, 73.
2) by order of succession and inheritance: so thou the garland wearest s. H4B IV, 5, 202. but as s. from blood to blood, your right of birth, R3 III, 7, 135.
